title: ERC-7730 Test Cases Schema (v2)
description: v2 schema for defining test cases against ERC-7730 clear-signing descriptors. A test file lives at registry/<entity>/testsv2/<descriptor-name>.tests.json and is consumed by the implementation runners listed in .github/test-runner-docs/. Each test asserts the human-readable output (intent, owner, fields) the implementation should produce for a given transaction or typed-data input.

descriptor.description: Relative path to the ERC-7730 descriptor under test (resolved from the test file's directory).

dataProvider.description: Mock data injected into the runner so tests do not require network access. Address keys are lowercase 0x-prefixed.

addressNames.description: Address → display name map (ENS names end in `.eth`; others are local names).

blockTimestamps.description: Block height (decimal string key) → Unix timestamp in seconds.

tests.description: List of test cases. The `description` field serves as the join key between this file and runner-produced results.json files.

calldataTest.description: Test case for a calldata (raw signed transaction) descriptor.

description.description: Human-readable identifier — used as the join key against runner output.

rawTx.description: Raw signed transaction hex string (0x prefixed).

txHash.description: Transaction hash for reference only (e.g. link to Etherscan).

eip712Test.description: Test case for an EIP-712 typed-data descriptor.

description.description: Human-readable identifier — used as the join key against runner output.

renderedOutput.description: The human-readable output an implementation should produce. Mirrored by `cases[].rendered` in results.json. See .github/test-runner-docs/README.md.

intent.description: The transaction intent shown to the user (e.g. 'Approve', 'Swap'). The action label declared in the descriptor's `intent`; for descriptors using a templated intent, this is the un-interpolated literal form.

interpolatedIntent.description: Optional. The fully-rendered interpolatedIntent string after substituting any template placeholders against the formatted fields (e.g. 'Swap 100 USDC for DAI'). Omit when the descriptor has no interpolatedIntent.

owner.description: The descriptor owner shown to the user (e.g. 'Aave DAO').

fields.description: Field labels mapped to values. Values are strings, or — for calldata-formatted fields — nested objects with the same shape as `renderedOutput` (`intent`, `owner`, `fields`). Nesting is recursive. Group fields are flattened to top-level entries; they are never represented as nested objects.
